overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character exploring a dark gothic cathedral interior at night. The character walks past medieval armor displays and stained glass windows illuminated by blue moonlight, creating an atmospheric and foreboding environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with armor display and rose window

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past a suit of medieval armor display towards a large circular rose window

entered.detail: large circular stained glass rose window with intricate gothic tracery patterns
full suit of medieval plate armor on display stand
dark wooden door frame with stone surround
polished marble floor tiles reflecting dim ambient light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior, passing a prominent suit of armor display. A large circular rose window is visible in the background as the character moves forward across the polished marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark transitional corridor between cathedral chambers

events.description: entering a darker corridor section with minimal ambient light and rough stone walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow dark corridor with close stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: rough hewn stone walls flanking the narrow passage
unlit corridor continuing into darkness ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a darker narrow corridor with rough stone walls, leaving the initial chamber with the rose window behind. Visibility decreases significantly in this transitional passage between rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: stained glass alcove with moonlight illumination

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the tall stained glass window

agents.ego_description: approaching a large stained glass window and looking up to examine the intricate gothic designs

entered.detail: tall gothic stained glass window with blue and red panels illuminated by moonlight from outside
stone bench or altar along the right wall of the alcove

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a small alcove featuring a large ornate stained glass window glowing with blue moonlight. The character approaches the window and looks up at the detailed gothic artwork, pausing to observe the intricate patterns before turning away.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to stone archway exit

events.description: character turns away from the window and begins walking toward a stone archway

agents.ego_description: turning away from the stained glass window and walking toward a heavy stone archway door

entered.detail: heavy wooden door set within a carved stone archway
dark wall hanging or tapestry on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the stained glass window and proceeds toward a stone archway with a heavy wooden door. The camera follows as the character approaches the doorway, moving deeper into the cathedral's dark interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic cathedral that shifts from a grand, open hall into a series of claustrophobic corridors and moonlit alcoves. It begins on a polished marble floor, passing a suit of armor with a large circular rose window looming in the background. As the character moves forward, the space narrows into a dark corridor of rough stone walls where visibility decreases significantly. The scene then opens into a small alcove illuminated by the blue glow of an ornate stained glass window, where the camera pauses to observe the intricate gothic artwork. Finally, the character turns away from the light and proceeds through a stone archway toward a heavy wooden door, moving deeper into the cathedral's oppressive darkness.
